heroHeadline: Iran Talks Collapse; Trump Orders Hormuz Blockade
heroSubtitle: VP Vance flies home empty-handed after 21-hour Islamabad negotiations fail — Trump immediately orders US Navy to blockade the Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices surging. Artemis II crew safely home after historic lunar mission.
footerNote: Aggregated intelligence from all US-based Watchboard trackers.
